_meta.scope: Fake-name cleanup round 5, found during batch-07 prep. Web-verified 2026-07-21.
_meta.provenance: Pyramid sourced from retailer listings the same day. No scraped content.

replacement.name: Eau de Lacoste L.12.12 Pour Elle Sparkling
replacement.description: Red apple and blackberry over a playful cotton-candy heart. Bright, sweet and made for daytime energy.
replacement.note: NAME REPAIR: 'Pour Elle Energetic' does not exist; the real line is Sparkling/Elegant/Natural/Magnetic/French Panache (verified 2026-07-21). Sparkling chosen: currently sold on lacoste.com, and renaming to Eau Fraiche would duplicate the Fraiche row already in this pool. Pyramid sourced from retailer listings.
